sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.brd_id, A.item_no, A.user_id, A.user_nm$v_PLANG$ AS USER_NM, A.user_email, A.title, A.content, A.poll_enddate, A.post_date, B.public_result_flg, B.public_flg, B.multi_response_flg, B.end_flg, B.response_range FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_PERMISSION B ON A.brd_id = B.brd_id AND A.brd_id = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND A.item_no = B.item_no AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE (A.brd_id = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND A.complete_flag = 'Y' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (B.response_range = '0' AND DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL A.post_term DAY)) OR (A.user_id = #v_PUSERID#) )
AND A.title LIKE '%' ||#v_PTITLE# || '%'
AND B.response_range = #v_PRANGE#
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PEDATE$ 23:59:59', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PSDATE$ 00:00:00', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
UNION SELECT A.brd_id, A.item_no, A.user_id, A.user_nm$v_PLANG$ AS USER_NM, A.user_email, A.title, A.content, A.poll_enddate, A.post_date, B.public_result_flg, B.public_flg, B.multi_response_flg, B.end_flg, B.response_range FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM A, TBL_POLL_PERMISSION B, TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON D WHERE (A.brd_id = B.brd_id AND A.item_no = B.item_no AND B.response_range = '1' AND A.brd_id = D.brd_id AND A.item_no = D.item_no AND D.user_id = #v_PUSERID# AND A.brd_id = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND A.complete_flag = 'Y' AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL A.post_term DAY) >= DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND A.title LIKE '%' ||#v_PTITLE# || '%'
AND B.response_range = #v_PRANGE#
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PEDATE$ 23:59:59', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PSDATE$ 00:00:00', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
) ) P ORDER BY P.post_date ASC, P.item_no ASC LIMIT #v_PTOTALCNT# ) K ORDER BY K.item_no DESC, K.post_date DESC LIMIT #v_PPAGESIZE#
SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_PERMISSION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT attachno, attachname, attachurl, attachtype FROM TBL_POLL_ATTACH WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND question_no = #v_pQuesNo# AND answerno = #v_pAnswerNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT attachno, attachname, attachurl, attachtype FROM TBL_POLL_ATTACH WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND question_no = #v_pQuesNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND ques_sn IS NOT NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY ques_sn
SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND question_no = #v_pQuesNo# AND ques_sn IS NOT NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY ques_sn
SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_TABLE_ANSWER WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND question_no = #v_pQuesNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY question_no
SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_ANSWER WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND question_no = #v_pQuesNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY question_no
SELECT public_flg, response_range FROM TBL_POLL_PERMISSION WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT user_id, response_date FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND user_id = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT attachno, attachname, attachurl, attachtype FROM TBL_POLL_ATTACH WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND question_no = #v_pQuesNo# AND answerno = #v_pAnswerNo# AND attachno = #v_pAttachNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, QUESTION_NO, RESPONSENO, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, ANSWER_SUBJECTIVITY, ANSWER_VIEWSELECT, RESPONSEUSER_ID, RESPONSEUSER_NAME$v_pLang$ AS RESPONSEUSER_NAME, RESPONSEUSER_EMAIL, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_ID, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME$v_pLang$ AS RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME, RESPONSEUSER_POSITION$v_pLang$ AS RESPONSEUSER_POSITION, RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB$v_pLang$ AS RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB, RESPONSEUSER_GENDER, RESPONSEUSER_AGE, RESPONSE_DATE, RESPONSEUSER_IP FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND ANSWER_SUBJECTIVITY IS NOT NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) P ORDER BY P.RESPONSENO DESC WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pTotalCnt# ) K WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pPageSize# ORDER BY K.RESPONSENO ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT RESPONSEUSER_ID AS USER_ID, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_NAME$v_pLang$) AS USER_NAME, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_EMAIL) AS USER_EMAIL, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_ID) AS USER_DEPT_ID, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME$v_pLang$) AS USER_DEPT_NAME, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_POSITION$v_pLang$) AS USER_POSITION, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB$v_pLang$) AS USER_JIKGUB, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_GENDER) AS USER_GENDER, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_AGE) AS USER_AGE, MAX(RESPONSE_DATE) AS RESPONSE_DATE FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESPONSEUSER_ID LIMIT #v_pTotalCnt# ) P ORDER BY P.RESPONSE_DATE DESC LIMIT #v_pPageSize# ) K ORDER BY K.RESPONSE_DATE ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID, USER_NM$v_pLang$ AS USER_NAME, USER_EMAIL AS USER_EMAIL, USER_DEPT_ID AS USER_DEPT_ID, USER_DEPT_NM$v_pLang$ AS USER_DEPT_NAME, USER_POS$v_pLang$ AS USER_POSITION, USER_JIKGUB$v_pLang$ AS USER_JIKGUB, USER_GENDER AS USER_GENDER, USER_AGE AS USER_AGE, RESPONSE_DATE AS RESPONSE_DATE FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND RESPONSE_DATE IS NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# LIMIT #v_pPageSize# ) P ORDER BY P.USER_ID DESC LIMIT #v_pTotalCnt# ) K ORDER BY K.USER_ID ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT QUESTION_NO , QUESCONTENT , ANSWERTYPE FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUES_SN IS NOT NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY QUES_SN

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND ANSWERTYPE = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY QUES_SN
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND ANSWERTYPE = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY QUES_SN

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT IFNULL(r.QUESTION_NO, NULL) as question_no, IFNULL(r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, NULL) as answer_objectivity, IFNULL(r.RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME, NULL) as responseUser_dept_name, /* IFNULL(r.RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME2, 'NULL') responseUser_dept_name2, */ MAX(Q.QUESCONTENT) as quescontent , MAX(TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERCONTENT) as answer , COUNT(*) as Q_count FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE r INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_QUESTION Q ON r.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO AND r.ITEM_NO = Q.ITEM_NO AND r.TENANT_ID = Q.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_ANSWER ON TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = r.ITEM_NO AND r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY = TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERNO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.QUESTION_NO = r.QUESTION_NO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.TENANT_ID = r.TENANT_ID WHERE r.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num# AND r.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY r.QUESTION_NO, r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, r.RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME WITH ROLLUP) T ORDER BY QUESTION_NO ASC, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY ASC, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT IFNULL(r.question_no, NULL) as question_no, IFNULL(r.answer_objectivity, NULL) as answer_objectivity, IFNULL(r.responseUser_dept_name, NULL) as responseUser_dept_name, -- IFNULL(r.responseUser_dept_name2, 'NULL') responseUser_dept_name2, MAX(Q.quescontent) as quescontent , MAX(TBL_POLL_ANSWER.AnswerContent) as answer , COUNT(*) as Q_count FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE r INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_QUESTION Q ON r.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO AND r.ITEM_NO = Q.ITEM_NO AND r.TENANT_ID = Q.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_ANSWER ON TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = r.ITEM_NO AND r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY = TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERNO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.QUESTION_NO = r.QUESTION_NO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.TENANT_ID = r.TENANT_ID WHERE r.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num# AND Q.QUESTION_NO = #v_Que_num# AND r.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY r.QUESTION_NO, r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, r.RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME WITH ROLLUP) T ORDER BY QUESTION_NO ASC, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY ASC, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT IFNULL(r.QUESTION_NO, NULL) question_no, r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, r.RESPONSEUSER_POSITION, MAX(Q.QUESCONTENT) quescontent , MAX(TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERCONTENT) answer , COUNT(*) Q_count FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE r JOIN TBL_POLL_QUESTION Q ON r.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO AND r.ITEM_NO = Q.ITEM_NO AND r.TENANT_ID = Q.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_POLL_ANSWER ON TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = r.ITEM_NO AND r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY = TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERNO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.QUESTION_NO = r.QUESTION_NO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.TENANT_ID = r.TENANT_ID WHERE r.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num# AND r.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY r.QUESTION_NO,r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY,r.RESPONSEUSER_POSITION WITH ROLLUP) T ORDER BY QUESTION_NO ASC, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY ASC, RESPONSEUSER_POSITION ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT IFNULL(r.question_no,NULL) question_no , r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, r.RESPONSEUSER_POSITION, MAX(Q.QUESCONTENT) quescontent , MAX(TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERCONTENT) answer , COUNT(*) Q_count FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE r JOIN TBL_POLL_QUESTION Q ON r.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO AND r.ITEM_NO = Q.ITEM_NO AND r.TENANT_ID = Q.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_POLL_ANSWER ON TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = r.ITEM_NO AND r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY = TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERNO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.QUESTION_NO = r.QUESTION_NO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.TENANT_ID = r.TENANT_ID WHERE r.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num# AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num# AND Q.QUESTION_NO = #v_Que_num# AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND Q.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY r.QUESTION_NO,r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY,r.RESPONSEUSER_POSITION WITH ROLLUP) T ORDER BY QUESTION_NO ASC, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY ASC, RESPONSEUSER_POSITION ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT IFNULL(r.question_no, NULL) as question_no, IFNULL(r.answer_objectivity, NULL) as answer_objectivity, /* 수정(2005.06.28) : 직급이 없는 경우 ' ' 반환하여 빈공백과 구별되도록 수정 */ /* CASE r.responseUser_jikGub2 WHEN N'' THEN N'' ELSE r.responseUser_jikGub2 END AS responseUser_jikGub, */ r.RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2 as responseUser_JikGub, MAX(Q.QUESCONTENT) as quescontent, MAX(TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERCONTENT) as answer, COUNT(*) AS Q_count FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE r INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_QUESTION Q ON r.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO AND r.ITEM_NO = Q.ITEM_NO AND r.TENANT_ID = Q.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_ANSWER ON TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = r.ITEM_NO AND r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY = TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERNO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.QUESTION_NO = r.QUESTION_NO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.TENANT_ID = r.TENANT_ID WHERE (r.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num#) AND (TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num#) GROUP BY r.QUESTION_NO,r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY,r.RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2 WITH ROLLUP) T ORDER BY QUESTION_NO ASC, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY ASC, RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2 ASC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT IFNULL(r.QUESTION_NO, NULL) as question_no, IFNULL(r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, NULL) as answer_objectivity, /* 수정(2005.06.28) : 직급이 없는 경우 ' ' 반환하여 빈공백과 구별되도록 수정 */ /* CASE r.responseUser_jikGub2 WHEN N'' THEN N' ' ELSE r.responseUser_jikGub2 END AS responseUser_jikGub, */ r.RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2 AS responseUser_jikGub, MAX(Q.QUESCONTENT) as quescontent, MAX(TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERCONTENT) as answer, COUNT(*) AS Q_count FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE r INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_QUESTION Q ON r.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO AND r.ITEM_NO = Q.ITEM_NO AND r.TENANT_ID = Q.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_ANSWER ON TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = r.ITEM_NO AND r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY = TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ANSWERNO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.QUESTION_NO = r.QUESTION_NO AND TBL_POLL_ANSWER.TENANT_ID = r.TENANT_ID WHERE (r.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num#) AND (TBL_POLL_ANSWER.ITEM_NO = #v_item_num#) AND (Q.QUESTION_NO = #v_Que_num#) GROUP BY r.QUESTION_NO,r.ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY,r.RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2 WITH ROLLUP) T ORDER BY QUESTION_NO ASC, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY ASC, RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2 ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT B.* FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION A JOIN TBL_POLL_RESPONSE B ON A.ITEM_NO = B.ITEM_NO AND A.QUESTION_NO = B.QUESTION_NO AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.RESPONSEUSER_ID ASC, A.QUES_SN ASC, B.QUESTION_NO ASC

SELECT A.TITLE , A.CONTENT , A.POST_TERM , B.PUBLIC_FLG , B.MULTI_RESPONSE_FLG , B.PUBLIC_RESULT_FLG , B.RESPONSE_RANGE FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM A JOIN TBL_POLL_PERMISSION B ON A.BRD_ID = B.BRD_ID AND A.ITEM_NO = B.ITEM_NO AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_ID = #v_BRD_ID# AND A.ITEM_NO = #v_ITEM_NO# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RESPONSEUSER_ID) FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY IS NOT NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RESPONSEUSER_ID) FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY IS NOT NULL AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT brd_id, item_no, question_no, responseno, answer_objectivity, answer_subjectivity, answer_viewselect, responseuser_id, responseuser_name$v_pLang$ AS responseuser_name, responseuser_email, responseuser_dept_id, responseuser_dept_name$v_pLang$ AS responseuser_dept_name, responseuser_position$v_pLang$ AS responseuser_position, responseuser_jikgub$v_pLang$ AS responseuser_jikgub, responseuser_gender, responseuser_age, response_date, responseuser_ip FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND question_no = #v_pQuesNo# AND answer_subjectivity IS NOT NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) P
SELECT answer_answercontent FROM TBL_POLL_TABLE_ANSWER WHERE item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND brd_id = #v_pStrBrdID# AND question_no = #v_pQuestionNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY answerno ASC
SELECT ANSWER_ANSWERCONTENT FROM TBL_POLL_TABLE_ANSWER WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_PITEMNO# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_PQUESNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ANSWERNO

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM (SELECT RESPONSEUSER_ID AS USER_ID, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_NAME$v_pLang$) AS USER_NAME, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_ID) AS USER_DEPT_ID, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_EMAIL) AS USER_EMAIL, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_POSITION$v_pLang$) AS USER_POSITION, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME$v_pLang$) AS USER_DEPT_NAME, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB$v_pLang$) AS USER_JIKGUB, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_GENDER) AS USER_GENDER, MAX(RESPONSEUSER_AGE) AS USER_AGE, MAX(RESPONSE_DATE) AS RESPONSE_DATE FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID= #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO=#v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESPONSEUSER_ID ) P
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM (SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID, USER_NM$v_pLang$ AS USER_NAME, USER_DEPT_NM$v_pLang$ AS USER_DEPT_NAME, USER_DEPT_ID AS USER_DEPT_ID, USER_EMAIL AS USER_EMAIL, USER_POS$v_pLang$ AS USER_POSITION, USER_JIKGUB$v_pLang$ AS USER_JIKGUB, USER_GENDER AS USER_GENDER, USER_AGE AS USER_AGE, RESPONSE_DATE AS RESPONSE_DATE FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND RESPONSE_DATE IS NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )P

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ITEM_NO FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(P.item_no) FROM (SELECT A.brd_id, A.item_no, A.user_id, A.user_nm$v_PLANG$ AS user_nm, A.user_email, A.title, A.content, A.poll_enddate, A.post_date, B.public_result_flg, B.public_flg, B.multi_response_flg, B.end_flg, B.response_range FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_POLL_PERMISSION B ON A.brd_id = B.brd_id AND A.brd_id = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND A.item_no = B.item_no AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE (A.brd_id = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND A.complete_flag = 'Y' AND (B.response_range = '0' AND DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL A.post_term DAY) ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# OR A.USER_ID = #v_PUSERID# )
AND A.title LIKE '%' || #v_PTITLE# || '%'
AND B.response_range = #v_PRANGE#
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PEDATE$ 23:59:59', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PSDATE$ 00:00:00', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
UNION SELECT A.brd_id, A.item_no, A.user_id, A.user_nm$v_PLANG$ AS user_nm, A.user_email, A.title, A.content, A.poll_enddate, A.post_date, B.public_result_flg, B.public_flg, B.multi_response_flg, B.end_flg, B.response_range FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM A, TBL_POLL_PERMISSION B, TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON D WHERE (A.brd_id = B.brd_id AND A.item_no = B.item_no AND B.response_range = '1' AND A.brd_id = D.brd_id AND A.item_no = D.item_no AND D.user_id = #v_PUSERID# AND A.brd_id = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND A.complete_flag = 'Y' AND DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL A.post_term DAY) >= DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# )
AND A.title LIKE '%' || #v_PTITLE# || '%'
AND B.response_range = #v_PRANGE#
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PEDATE$ 23:59:59', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.poll_enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= DATE_FORMAT('$v_PSDATE$ 00:00:00', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
) P
SELECT MAX(question_no) maxquesNo FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(responseno), 0) FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE brd_id = #v_pstrBrdID# AND item_no = #v_pItemNo# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEM SET USER_ID = #v_pUserID#, USER_NM = #v_pUserNM#, USER_NM2 = #v_pUserNM2#, USER_EMAIL = #v_pUserEmail#, TITLE = #v_pTitle#, CONTENT = #v_pContent#, POST_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pPostDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), POST_TERM = #v_pPostTerm#, ITEM_IMP = #v_pItemImp#, HASATTACH = '0', ITEM_GB = '1', POLL_STARTDATE = #v_pSDate#, POLL_ENDDATE = #v_pEdate#, COMPLETE_FLAG = 'N' WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_ITEM ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_NM2, USER_EMAIL, TITLE, CONTENT, POST_DATE, POST_TERM, ITEM_REF, ITEM_LEVEL, ITEM_STEP, ITEM_IMP, HASATTACH, ITEM_GB, POLL_STARTDATE, POLL_ENDDATE, COMPLETE_FLAG, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pUserID#, #v_pUserNM#, #v_pUserNM2#, #v_pUserEmail#, #v_pTitle#, #v_pContent#, DATE_FORMAT(#v_pPostDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_pPostTerm#, #v_pItemRef#, 0, 0, #v_pItemImp#, 0, 1, #v_pSDate#, #v_pEdate#, 'N', #tenantID# )

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_POLL_PERMISSION SET PUBLIC_RESULT_FLG = #v_PRESULTFLG#, PUBLIC_FLG = #v_PPUBLICFLG#, MULTI_RESPONSE_FLG = #v_PMULTIFLG#, RESPONSE_RANGE = #v_PRESRANGE# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_PERMISSION ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, PUBLIC_RESULT_FLG, PUBLIC_FLG, MULTI_RESPONSE_FLG, RESPONSE_RANGE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_PRESULTFLG#, #v_PPUBLICFLG#, #v_PMULTIFLG#, #v_PRESRANGE#, #tenantID# )

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT BRD_ID , ITEM_NO , GUBUN , GUBUN_ID FROM TBL_POLL_ITEMACL WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND GUBUN = #v_pGubunFg# AND GUBUN_ID = #v_pGubunID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_ITEMACL ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, GUBUN, GUBUN_ID, GUBUN_NM, GUBUN_NM2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pGubunFg#, #v_pGubunID#, #v_pGubunNm#, #v_pGubunNm2#, #tenantID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(ITEM_NO) MAXNO FROM TBL_QS_ITEMSEQ WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_QS_ITEMSEQ SET ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT BRD_ID , ITEM_NO , USER_ID FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND USER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_NM2, USER_EMAIL, USER_DEPT_ID, USER_DEPT_NM, USER_DEPT_NM2, USER_POS, USER_POS2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pUserID#, #v_pUserNm#, #v_pUserNm2#, #v_pUserEmail#, #v_pUserDeptID#, #v_pUserDeptNM#, #v_pUserDeptNM2#, #v_pUserPOS#, #v_pUserPOS2#, #tenantID# )

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT BRD_ID , ITEM_NO , USER_ID FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND USER_ID = #v_pGubunID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_NM2, USER_EMAIL, USER_DEPT_ID, USER_DEPT_NM, USER_DEPT_NM2, USER_POS, USER_POS2, USER_GENDER, USER_AGE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pGubunID#, #v_pGubunNm#, #v_pGubunNm2#, #v_pUserEmail#, #v_pUserDeptID#, #v_pUserDeptNM#, #v_pUserDeptNM2#, #v_pUserPOS#, #v_pUserPOS2#, #v_pUserGender#, #v_pUserAge#, #tenantID# )

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_QUESTION ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, QUESTION_NO, QUESCONTENT, ANSWERTYPE, MULTISELECT, QUES_SN, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pQuesNo#, #v_pQuesContent#, #v_pAnswerType#, #v_pmultiselect#, #v_pQuesNo#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_ATTACH ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, QUESTION_NO, ANSWERNO, ATTACHNO, ATTACHNAME, ATTACHURL, ATTACHTYPE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pQuesNo#, #v_pAnswerNo#, #v_pAttachNo#, #v_pAttachName#, #v_pAttachURL#, #v_pAttachType#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_TABLE_ANSWER ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, QUESTION_NO, ANSWERNO, ANSWER_ANSWERCONTENT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pQuesNo#, #v_pAnswerNo#, #v_pAnswer_AnswerContent#, #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_ANSWER ( BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, QUESTION_NO, ANSWERNO, ANSWERCONTENT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pQuesNo#, #v_pAnswerNo#, #v_pAnswerContent#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEM SET COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y' WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEM SET poll_enddate = #v_penddate# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_POLL_PERMISSION SET END_FLG = #v_pendflg# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ITEMACL WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ANSWER WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_PERMISSION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ITEMREAD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ITEMACL WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_PERMISSION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEM SET READ_CNT = #v_pReadCnt# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEMREAD SET READ_DATE = #v_pReadDate# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND USER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON SET RESPONSE_DATE = #v_pNow# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND USER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEM SET RES_CNT = RES_CNT + 1 WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_ITEMREAD (BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, USER_ID, READ_DATE, USER_NM, USER_NM2, USER_DEPTID, USER_DEPTNM, USER_DEPTNM2, USER_POSNM, USER_POSNM2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES (#v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pUserID#, #v_pReadDate#, #v_pUserNM#, #v_pUserNM2#, #v_pUserDeptID#, #v_pUserDeptNM#, #v_pUserDeptNM2#, #v_pUserPosNM#, #v_pUserPosNM2#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEM SET TITLE = #v_psubject#, CONTENT = #v_pcontent#, POST_TERM = #v_ppostterm#, POLL_STARTDATE = #v_pstartdate#, POLL_ENDDATE = #v_penddate# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_POLL_PERMISSION SET PUBLIC_RESULT_FLG = #v_presultflg#, PUBLIC_FLG = #v_pflg#, MULTI_RESPONSE_FLG = #v_pmultiflg#, END_FLG = #v_pendflg#, RESPONSE_RANGE = #v_presponserange# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION a JOIN TBL_POLL_ANSWER b ON a.BRD_ID = b.BRD_ID AND a.ITEM_NO = b.ITEM_NO AND a.QUESTION_NO = b.QUESTION_NO AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID WHERE a.BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND a.ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY a.QUESTION_NO, b.QUESTION_NO
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ANSWER WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTACHURL, ATTACHTYPE FROM TBL_POLL_ATTACH WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_POLL_ATTACH WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEM_NO) FROM (SELECT A.ITEM_NO FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSEPERSON A LEFT JOIN TBL_POLL_ITEM B ON A.BRD_ID = B.BRD_ID AND A.ITEM_NO = B.ITEM_NO AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #v_pUSERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND #nowDate# BETWEEN B.POLL_STARTDATE AND B.POLL_ENDDATE AND RESPONSE_DATE IS NULL AND B.COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y' UNION SELECT A.ITEM_NO FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM A LEFT JOIN TBL_POLL_RESPONSE B ON A.BRD_ID = B.BRD_ID AND A.ITEM_NO = B.ITEM_NO AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND B.RESPONSEUSER_ID = #v_pUSERID# LEFT JOIN TBL_POLL_PERMISSION C ON A.BRD_ID = C.BRD_ID AND A.ITEM_NO = C.ITEM_NO AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE #nowDate# BETWEEN A.POLL_STARTDATE AND A.POLL_ENDDATE AND B.RESPONSEUSER_NAME IS NULL AND A.COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y' AND B.RESPONSEUSER_ID IS NULL AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.RESPONSE_RANGE = '0' ) CNT
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(ITEM_NO),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_QS_ITEMSEQ WHERE BRD_ID = #brdID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT READ_DATE FROM TBL_POLL_ITEMREAD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND USER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND RESPONSEUSER_ID = #v_puserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_QS_BRDMNG WHERE BRD_ID = #brdID# AND ADMIN_FG = '1'
SELECT COUNT(RESPONSE_DATE) FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND RESPONSEUSER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT RES_CNT FROM TBL_POLL_ITEM WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(READ_DATE) FROM TBL_POLL_ITEMREAD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND USER_ID = #v_pUserID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT MAX(responseno) RESNO FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(*) ANSCNT FROM TBL_POLL_ANSWER WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(*) RESPERSON FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY = #v_piCount# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_pQuesNo# AND ANSWER_VIEWSELECT = #v_piCount# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(QUESTION_NO) FROM TBL_POLL_QUESTION WHERE ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# AND QUES_SN IS NOT NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ANSWER_SUBJECTIVITY FROM TBL_POLL_RESPONSE WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PSTRBRDID# AND ITEM_NO = #v_PITEMNO# AND QUESTION_NO = #v_PQUESNO# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_RESPONSE (BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, QUESTION_NO, RESPONSENO, ANSWER_OBJECTIVITY, RESPONSEUSER_ID, RESPONSEUSER_NAME, RESPONSEUSER_NAME2, RESPONSEUSER_EMAIL, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_ID, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME2, RESPONSEUSER_POSITION, RESPONSEUSER_POSITION2, RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB, RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2, RESPONSEUSER_GENDER, RESPONSEUSER_AGE, RESPONSE_DATE, RESPONSEUSER_IP, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pQuesNo#, #v_pResNo#, #v_pAobj#, #v_pUserID#, #v_pUserNM#, #v_pUserNM2#, #v_pEmail#, #v_pDeptID#, #v_pDeptNM#, #v_pDeptNM2#, #v_pPos#, #v_pPos2#, #v_pJikGub#, #v_pJikGub2#, #v_pGender#, #v_pAge#, DATE_FORMAT(#v_pResDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_pResUserIP#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_POLL_RESPONSE (BRD_ID, ITEM_NO, QUESTION_NO, RESPONSENO, ANSWER_SUBJECTIVITY, RESPONSEUSER_ID, RESPONSEUSER_NAME, RESPONSEUSER_NAME2, RESPONSEUSER_EMAIL, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_ID, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME, RESPONSEUSER_DEPT_NAME2, RESPONSEUSER_POSITION, RESPONSEUSER_POSITION2, RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB, RESPONSEUSER_JIKGUB2, RESPONSEUSER_GENDER, RESPONSEUSER_AGE, RESPONSE_DATE, RESPONSEUSER_IP, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#v_pstrBrdID#, #v_pItemNo#, #v_pQuesNo#, #v_pResNo#, #v_pAsub#, #v_pUserID#, #v_pUserNM#, #v_pUserNM2#, #v_pEmail#, #v_pDeptID#, #v_pDeptNM#, #v_pDeptNM2#, #v_pPos#, #v_pPos2#, #v_pJikGub#, #v_pJikGub2#, #v_pGender#, #v_pAge#, #v_pResDate#, #v_pResUserIP#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_QS_ITEMSEQ SET ITEM_NO = #v_pItemNo# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pstrBrdID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_POLL_ITEM SET POLL_ENDDATE = #endDate# WHERE BRD_ID = #brdID# AND ITEM_NO = #itemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_POLL_PERMISSION SET END_FLG = #endFlag# WHERE BRD_ID = #brdID# AND ITEM_NO = #itemNo# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
